column1: # Meyer et al. 2025 (Cancer Cell) Bodenmiller TNBC IMC -- panel from deposited raw IMC data
# Source: acquisition .txt headers inside ZTMA174_raw.zip / ZTMA249_raw.zip,
#   Zenodo record 10890543 (CC-BY-4.0), read via HTTP range by research agent (not memory).
#   Paper STAR Methods Key-Resources-Table (clone numbers + exact CK identities) is paywalled.
# IMC exports TRUNCATE antibody labels; the CK channels below are clone-truncated and their
# exact identity (CK5 / CK8-18 / CK19 / panCK ...) is NOT resolvable from the .txt header alone
# -> CK overlap with METABRIC is reported PROVISIONAL in the overlap script, not counted strict.
